tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.verdict: The voices are worth it. The credit math isn't always.

tools.name: Fathom
tools.verdict: The cleanest meeting summary I got came from the free one.

tools.name: Granola
tools.verdict: Six rough bullets in, a summary sharper than my own notes out.

tools.name: n8n
tools.verdict: It runs our whole content pipeline — once you survive the learning curve.

tools.name: Fireflies.ai
tools.verdict: Brilliant for the whole team. Overkill for just you.

tools.name: Fliki
tools.verdict: The visuals are stock-basic. The voice is the reason you'd actually use it.

tools.name: Zapier
tools.verdict: 9,000 apps and the gentlest start — then the per-task bill arrives.

tools.name: InVideo AI
tools.verdict: It builds a whole video from one sentence. Then it tells you what that cost.

tools.name: Make
tools.verdict: Zapier's power at n8n's price — until the operations meter catches you.

tools.name: Pictory
tools.verdict: It turned my blog post into a video in two minutes. The clean download cost extra.

tools.name: Cartesia
tools.verdict: Sub-100ms voice that developers love and creators outgrow fast.

tools.name: Descript
tools.verdict: The transcript editing feels like magic. The AI-credit bill breaks the spell.

tools.name: Murf AI
tools.verdict: The studio is the reason to buy Murf. The voice isn't.

tools.name: Otter.ai
tools.verdict: The AI notes nailed it. The stingy free plan and a privacy suit didn't.
